name: Levi Strauss & Co.
description: Levi Strauss & Co. is a prominent American apparel company globally recognized for its iconic Levi's brand of denim jeans. Founded in 1853 and headquartered in San Francisco, the company designs, markets, and sells a wide range of jeanswear, casual clothing, and related accessories for men, women, and children. Beyond its flagship Levi's brand, the company manages a diverse portfolio that includes Dockers, Signature by Levi Strauss & Co., and Denizen. With a deep-rooted history in utility and rugged individuality, the firm continues to be a leader in the global fashion industry, emphasizing sustainability and self-expression.
